profile.ticker: "The test didn't work on you. You have to trust yourself."
profile.paragraph1: A recent graduate from Ashoka University with a four honors degree in Computer Science and Entrepreneurial Leadership with Research. With a strong foundation in data science, data analytics, and product management, his work focuses on developing building and scaling data layers and implement LLMs/AI/ML-integrated solutions.
profile.paragraph2: A Data Intern at DIME at the World Bank, where he contributed to Reproducibility Research Initiative. He is passionate about leveraging technology and data to drive positive social impact and contribute to the field of development economics.
profile.tacticalWeaponry: Python, MySQL, PowerBI, Data Science, Data Analytics, Neo4j, LLMs, RAG, Hugging Face, GitHub, MS Excel, Product Management, Stakeholder Management,
profile.operationalVerticals: Data Architecture, Network Graph Analytics, Reproducible Economics, Product Management

fieldPostings.org: New Zealand Cricket (via Education New Zealand)

blueprints.title: Puchtach: Cross-Lingual Benchmark for LLMs
blueprints.desc: Developed 100 Hindi QA pairs and executed 7,200 benchmark experiments across open-source LLMs to evaluate factual accuracy on government information retrieval tasks.

blueprints.title: Bias Detection in Book Reviews
blueprints.desc: Built a multi-dataset corpus of 44,000+ Goodreads reviews and engineered an ensemble voting machine framework to assess bias detection consistency.

blueprints.title: Declining Private Investment in India
blueprints.desc: Investigated determinants of India's private investment slowdown by engineering autoregressive models achieving a 0.554 out-of-sample R² utilizing Random Forest techniques.

blueprints.title: The Real Effects of Mobile Money
blueprints.desc: Conducted a rigorous empirical review of Paytm's post-demonetization adoption velocity using structural regression discontinuity and difference-in-differences designs.

blueprints.title: YouTube Feature Addition
blueprints.desc: Designed a comprehensive product roadmap, go-to-market strategies, and wireframe models for an interactive video learning tool guided by 56+ user surveys.

blueprints.title: Graph-Based Analysis of Restaurant Businesses
blueprints.desc: Designed and implemented a multi-tier Neo4j graph model analyzing Yelp's 52K+ corporate venues integrating ~7M nodes and link prediction pipelines.

blueprints.title: Queue Monitoring for Public Spaces
blueprints.desc: Designed a real-time crowd movement tracking system using traditional visual processing metrics, feature extraction, and background subtraction parameters.

blueprints.title: Threat Model for Truecaller
blueprints.desc: Conducted a technical privacy assessment extracting threat data vectors from Exodus Privacy Reports and engineered structural diagrams mapped via Mermaid Code.

degree.title: B.Sc (4 years Hons) in Computer Science & Entrepreneurial Leadership
